subject: Gaming
title: Donkey Kong Introduces Mario
description: A quick, practical guide to Donkey Kong Introduces Mario.

hook.text: A plumber, a gorilla, and a princess. Donkey Kong launched the most famous character in gaming.

buildup.text: Nintendo needed a hit for unsold cabinets. Shigeru Miyamoto—a toy designer, not a programmer—got the job.

discovery.text: The hero was originally called Jumpman. He became Mario—named after Nintendo's American warehouse landlord.

twist.text: Miyamoto gave Mario a hat because he couldn't draw hair. Limited tech created an iconic design.

climax.text: Donkey Kong saved Nintendo of America from bankruptcy and launched gaming's most valuable franchise.

punchline.text: A hat to hide bad graphics. Gaming's biggest icon was born.

quiz.question: Why does Mario wear a hat?
options: Miyamoto couldn't draw detailed hair with the limited technology
It was based on a real plumber's uniform
